title: ASOF JOIN skips NULL values
description:
### What happens?

ASOF join takes last non null value instead of last value. As far as I know, other databases and tools get last value regardless if it `NULL` or not. Expected behaviour would be adding condition, if you don't want null values:
```sql
ASOF JOIN some_table ON some_table.time <= other_table.time AND some_table.value IS NOT NULL
```

### To Reproduce

```sql
CREATE TABLE asof_test (
	time TIMESTAMP,
	value FLOAT
);

INSERT INTO asof_test (time, value) VALUES ('2025-07-15 00:00:00', 42);
INSERT INTO asof_test (time, value) VALUES ('2025-07-15 01:00:00', null);

SELECT time_series.time, asof_test.value
FROM (VALUES ('2025-07-15 02:00:00'::TIMESTAMP)) as time_series(time)
ASOF LEFT JOIN asof_test ON asof_test.time <= time_series.time; -- returns 42 but should be null
```

### OS:

x86_64

### DuckDB Version:

1.3.1

### DuckDB Client:

/

### Hardware:

### Full Name:

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE asof_test_2 (time TIMESTAMP, value FLOAT, category VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO asof_test_2 (time, value, category) VALUES ('2025-07-15 00:00:00', 42, 'A');
INSERT INTO asof_test_2 (time, value, category) VALUES ('2025-07-15 01:00:00', NULL, 'B');
SELECT time_series.time, asof_test_2.value FROM (VALUES ('2025-07-15 02:00:00'::TIMESTAMP)) as time_series(time) LEFT JOIN asof_test_2 ON asof_test_2.time <= time_series.time;

SELECT time_series.time, asof_test_2.value FROM (VALUES ('2025-07-15 02:00:00'::TIMESTAMP)) as time_series(time) LEFT JOIN asof_test_2 ON asof_test_2.time <= time_series.time AND asof_test_2.value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: ASOF JOIN ignores NULL values in result
